allow:
Bash(git commit -m "Add FloatingChatbot to all dashboard pages

- Added FloatingChatbot import to AppShell component
- Chatbot now appears on jobseeker, employer, and officer dashboards
- Maintains context-aware functionality across all pages")

Bash(git commit -m "Replace emoji icons with line icons in ROI section

- Changed from emoji to Lucide React line icons
- Added Clock, Briefcase, Star, and UserCircle icons
- Icons now have consistent orange-themed circular background
- Better visual consistency with the rest of the design")

Bash(git commit -m "Complete scroll-triggered animations for all landing page sections

- Added fade-in animations to all remaining sections
- Industry Solutions marquee: fade-in-up
- Career Services: fade-in-up header, scale-in grid with delay
- ROI metrics right side: fade-in-left with delay
- Resources section: fade-in-up with staggered delay
- Mobile App section: fade-in-right for content, fade-in-left for phone
- Final CTA: fade-in-up for entire card
- Footer: fade-in-up for content
- All animations use 0.8s duration with smooth easing

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix npm dependency conflicts for deployment

- Updated @lovable.dev/vite-tanstack-config to ^2.3.2
- Updated nitro to ^3.0.260603-beta
- Resolved peer dependency conflicts
- Regenerated package-lock.json

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "Remove nitro dependency to fix deployment conflicts

- Removed nitro from devDependencies
- nitro is already provided by @lovable.dev/vite-tanstack-config
- This resolves the peer dependency conflict
- Regenerated package-lock.json

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "Fix deployment with legacy peer deps and compatible versions

- Added .npmrc with legacy-peer-deps=true for deployment
- Reverted @lovable.dev/vite-tanstack-config to ^2.1.1
- Added nitro ^3.0.260603-beta back to match requirements
- This combination should resolve all peer dependency conflicts

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "Fix 404 errors in deployment with proper routing configuration

- Added vercel.json with rewrites to handle client-side routing
- Added public/_redirects file for additional deployment compatibility
- Configured all routes to redirect to index.html for SPA routing
- Added cache headers for static assets

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix dynamic import module error for Vercel deployment

- Added vercel.json with proper rewrites for SPA routing
- Updated vite.config.ts with production build optimizations
- Disabled manual chunks to fix dynamic imports
- Added optimizeDeps for core React dependencies
- Configured proper cache headers for static assets

This fixes the "Failed to fetch dynamically imported module" error
by ensuring proper routing and build configuration for Vercel.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "Fix MyDigital ID button alignment on sign-in page

- Changed grid layout to be responsive based on user role
- Uses grid-cols-1 for jobseekers (single button, centered)
- Uses grid-cols-2 for employer/officer (two buttons side by side)
- Added w-full to buttons to ensure proper width in grid cells

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

Bash(git commit -m "Fix white space at top of career pathway and community sections

- Removed unnecessary min-h-screen wrapper div
- Eliminated extra vertical spacing above headers
- Both sections now render flush with navigation")
